# tfe_scim_group

Reads a SCIM group synchronized from the configured Identity Provider into Terraform Enterprise.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The exact name of the SCIM group to retrieve (case-insensitive).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the SCIM group.
